markets.question: Spread: Bristol City FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 6 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Bristol City FC" if Bristol City FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Sheffield United FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Bristol City FC vs. Sheffield United FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 6 at 10:00 AM ET.

markets.question: Alcaraz vs. Ruud: Set 1 Games O/U 10.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Carlos Alcaraz and Casper Ruud in the BNP Paribas Open, scheduled for March 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 11. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official ATP results.
markets.groupItemTitle: BNP Paribas Open: Carlos Alcaraz vs Casper Ruud Set 1 O/U 10.5

events.title: BNP Paribas Open: Carlos Alcaraz vs Casper Ruud
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Carlos Alcaraz and Casper Ruud in the BNP Paribas Open, scheduled for March 11 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Carlos Alcaraz' if Carlos Alcaraz advances against Casper Ruud.

This market will resolve to 'Casper Ruud' if Casper Ruud advances against Carlos Alcaraz.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Rainbow Six Siege: 2GAME Esports vs Imperial Esports - Game 2 Winner
markets.description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege Upper bracket quarterfinal 3 match between 2GAME Esports and Imperial Esports in the South America League Challenger Series Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 12 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "2GAME Esports" if 2GAME Esports win Game 2 against Imperial Esports.

This market will resolve to "Imperial Esports" if Imperial Esports win Game 2 against 2GAME Esports.

If the match begins but is not completed, and Game 2 is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on the completed Game 2.

This market refers on the tennis match between Sonay Kartal and Elena Rybakina in the BNP Paribas Open, scheduled for March 11 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Sonay Kartal' if Sonay Kartal advances against Elena Rybakina.

This market will resolve to 'Elena Rybakina' if Elena Rybakina advances against Sonay Kartal.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Kartal vs. Rybakina: Match O/U 23.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Sonay Kartal and Elena Rybakina in the BNP Paribas Open, scheduled for March 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 24. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.

markets.question: Rainbow Six Siege: Vince Seven Esports vs AdvoGatos (BO3) - South America League Challenger Series Playoffs
markets.description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege Upper bracket quarterfinal 4 match between Vince Seven Esports and AdvoGatos in the South America League Challenger Series Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 12 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Vince Seven Esports" if Vince Seven Esports win the match against AdvoGatos.

This market will resolve to "AdvoGatos" if AdvoGatos win the match against Vince Seven Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Games Total: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege Upper bracket quarterfinal 4 match between Vince Seven Esports and AdvoGatos in the South America League Challenger Series Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 12 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if Vince Seven Esports and AdvoGatos play 3 or more games in this series.

If fewer than 3 games are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the total, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Spread: Ipswich Town FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 6 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Ipswich Town FC" if Ipswich Town FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Birmingham City FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
